mapper.select: SELECT * FROM table_info WHERE database_schema_id = #{databaseSchemaId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY table_name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE table_info SET table_custom_comment = #{tableCustomComment}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE table_info SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE database_schema_id = #{databaseSchemaId}
UPDATE table_info SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table_info WHERE database_schema_id = #{databaseSchemaId} AND is_deleted = 0
AND table_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
